scope_note: QA Megalithic Cert family [178]: certifies that megalithic construction used discrete integer arithmetic consistent with QA framework. (1) Megalithic Yard (MY=2.72ft) confirmed as quantum of length (p=0.0096, Thom 1962 84 circles). (2) Megalithic Fathom (2MY) as primary unit (p<0.0001, 83% even). (3) Construction triangles 3:4:5 and 5:12:13 = first two all-Fibonacci QN triples. (4) Mod-24 residue non-uniformity explained by fathom preference. Honest: Fibonacci ratios in diameter pairs NOT significant; mod-9 uniform. Tier 2 structural + Tier 3 statistical (MY/fathom).
